verses.1: Those who trust in the LORD are like Mount Zion. It cannot be moved; it abides forever.
verses.2: As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so the LORD surrounds His people, both now and forevermore.
verses.3: For the scepter of the wicked will not rest upon the land allotted to the righteous, so that the righteous will not put forth their hands to injustice.
verses.4: Do good, O LORD, to those who are good, and to the upright in heart.
verses.5: But those who turn to crooked ways the LORD will banish with the evildoers. Peace be upon Israel.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
